name: Marvell Technology, Inc.
business: Marvell is a leading supplier of data infrastructure semiconductor solutions spanning the data center core to network edge. It is a fabless supplier of high-performance semiconductor products with core strengths in developing and scaling complex System-on-a-Chip architectures. Its solutions serve data center and communications and other end markets.

exposures.sentence: Strong revenue growth from our data center market was driven by AI-related demand for our custom products and electro-optics portfolio.
We are developing Ultra Accelerator Link TM ( UALink TM ) switches and Ethernet for Scale-Up Networking ( ESUN ) switches for the emerging scale-out AI market.
Our product solutions serve two end markets: (i) data center and (ii) communications and other.

We are a fabless supplier of high-performance semiconductor products with core strengths in developing and scaling complex System-on-a-Chip architectures, integrating analog, mixed-signal and digital signal processing functionality.
Carrier infrastructure: Broadband access systems, Ethernet switches, Optical transport systems, Routers, Wireless radio access network ( RAN ) systems.
Our NITROX security processor family provides the functionality required for Layer 3 to Layer 5 secure communication in a single chip.
A portion of the business we acquired in our Avera acquisition in fiscal 2021 requires facility security clearances under the National Industrial Security Program.

catalysts.event: Sale of automotive ethernet business to Infineon Technologies AG
catalysts.sentence: On August 14, 2025, we completed the sale of our automotive ethernet business to Infineon Technologies AG for $2.5 billion in cash.

Subsequent to our fiscal 2026 year end, on February 2, 2026, we completed the previously announced acquisition of Celestial AI, Inc. ( Celestial ), a provider of a Photonic Fabric TM technology platform purpose-built for next-generation scale-up interconnect.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of XConn Technologies Holdings, Ltd.
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to our fiscal 2026 year end, on February 10, 2026, we completed the previously announced acquisition of XConn Technologies Holdings, Ltd. ( XConn ), a provider of advanced PCIe and CXL switching silicon, which expands our switching portfolio and augments our Ultra Accelerator Link TM ( UALink TM ) scale-up switch team.

catalysts.event: Amendment and restatement of credit facility to $1.5 billion
catalysts.sentence: On June 30, 2025, we entered into an agreement to amend and restate the credit facility to increase the borrowing capacity to $1.5 billion (as so amended and restated, the 2025 Revolving Credit Facility ).

On June 30, 2025, we completed a debt offering and issued (i) $500.0 million of Senior Notes with a 5-year term due in 2030 ( 2030 Senior Notes ) and (ii) $500.0 million of Senior Notes with a 10-year term due in 2035 ( 2035 Senior Notes ).

catalysts.event: Execution of accelerated share repurchase agreement for $1.0 billion
catalysts.sentence: On September 24, 2025, we executed an accelerated share repurchase agreement ( ASR Agreement ) with a counterparty financial institution to repurchase shares of our common stock in exchange for an upfront payment of $1.0 billion.

catalysts.event: Government incentives approved in a foreign jurisdiction
catalysts.sentence: On May 1, 2025, we received notification that our application for government incentives in a foreign jurisdiction in which we operate had been approved by the necessary government agencies.
